import React from 'react'; import { Home, Target, Banknote, User, ArrowUpRight, ArrowDownLeft, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react'; /** * HomeScreen Component * @param {Function} onNavigate - Function to handle navigation to other views (deposit, withdraw, etc.) */ const HomeScreen = ({ onNavigate }) => { return (
{/* Header Section */}

Hello, Faith Bode 👋

{/* Primary Wallet Card - Emerald Gradient */}
Main Portfolio Nest.

$1,500.00

Vault: $300.00

{/* Quick Action Grid */}
{/* Recent Activity Header */}

Recent Activity

{/* Activity List */}
{[ { title: 'Card Deposit', amount: 500, date: 'Today, 09:05 AM', type: 'in' }, { title: 'Electricity Bill', amount: 45, date: 'Yesterday, 11:15 AM', type: 'out' }, { title: 'Vault Transfer', amount: 150, date: '28 Jan, 04:20 PM', type: 'out' }, ].map((tx, i) => (
{tx.type === 'in' ? ( ) : ( )}

{tx.title}

{tx.date}

{tx.type === 'in' ? '+' : '-'}${tx.amount.toFixed(2)}

))}
); }; export default HomeScreen;
